message.reasoning_content:

The text is: "IoT-Based Smart Soil Regeneration Tracking System Using ESP32 with AI-Based Soil Nutrient Prediction, Future Crop Recommendation & Automated Soil Rejuvenation Control. Soil health plays a critical role in agricultural productivity, environmental sustainability, and crop quality. This paper presents an IoT-based smart soil regeneration tracking system using ESP32 with AI-based soil nutrient prediction, future crop recommendation, and automated soil rejuvenation control. The proposed system integrates soil moisture, TDS, and DHT11 sensors to continuously monitor soil and environmental parameters in real time. Sensor data is transmitted through IoT technology to"

2. The system integrates soil moisture, TDS, and DHT11 sensors to continuously monitor soil and environmental parameters in real time. This is a facet about the sensors used.

3. Sensor data is transmitted through IoT technology. This is about data transmission.

Sensor data is transmitted through IoT technology to ..."

The text is cut off at "to". So we only have up to "to". The facets we can extract:

- The system integrates soil moisture, TDS, and DHT11 sensors for continuous real-time monitoring. (Facet about sensor integration.)

- Sensor data is transmitted through IoT technology. (Facet about data transmission.)

These are three distinct facets. Should we include the importance of soil health? That sentence is not a facet of the system; it's a general statement.
